untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of 'candlestick pattern' type (unnamed in source), yearly low/high positions, and market regime classification (BULL_MARKET vs BEAR_MARKET) which are not available as atomic indicators. Entry condition 'Breakout occurs near yearly low' requires 52-week range context not provided by allowed indicators. Specific candlestick pattern recognition logic cannot be expressed with standard OHLC indicators alone.
translation_notes: Approximated breakout logic using Donchian channels (52-period proxy for yearly range) with directional body confirmation. Performance metrics (6.04%, 9.61%, -5.06%, -6.28%) suggest asymmetric returns by market regime; cannot encode without explicit market regime detection. Exit conditions marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source; used reversal to opposite Donchian extreme as reasonable default. Hold period set to 10 days based on source data time horizons (10-day, 3-day, 5-day returns shown).
